title: IntentConstraints
description: Optional routing constraints attached to a SwapIntent (SPEC §4.1).

maxVenues.description: Optional cap on the number of legs (venues) in a RoutePlan (SPEC §4.1, §4.4).

venueAllowList.description: Optional restriction: only these venues may appear in a RoutePlan (SPEC §4.1, §4.4).

privacy.description: Privacy mode. Default and only defined value is 'strict': no leg may learn the aggregate intent (SPEC §4.1, §7).
